economic_notes: Nation holds interests in Kvamua Enterprises LP (100%), Central Coast Commercial Fisheries LP (25%), Coastal Nations Fisheries LP (12.5%), Great Bear Carbon Credit LP, BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing LP. Purchased 3,220 lbs of unfished Halibut Quota for $402,500. Fisheries infrastructure under construction on Wuikinuxv territory. Youth Centre under construction in Village.
notes: Consolidated statements include Midawis Maintenance Services LP as a controlled entity consolidated line-by-line. Three GBEs accounted for under modified equity method: Kvamua Enterprises LP (100%), Central Coast Commercial Fisheries LP (25%), Coastal Nations Fisheries LP (12.5%). Several portfolio investments at cost. Earnings from GBEs of $4,359,548 significantly boosted surplus. Large increase in CMHC funding ($3.1M vs $247K prior year). Liability for contaminated sites of $3,986,721 related to power generation station and diesel spill. Asset retirement obligations of $2,075,423. Deferred revenue nearly doubled to $7,340,782. Total government transfers calculated as: ISC $5,865,460 + Province of BC $1,352,909 + FNHA $1,639,233 + DFO $1,809,866 + CMHC $3,139,230 + CIRNAC $0 + Great Bear Initiative Society $493,157 + WKNTC $10,000 = $14,309,855; schedule shows Federal non-ISC line of $4,949,096 and Provincial $1,352,909; OSR calculated as total revenue minus identifiable government transfers. No remuneration schedule included in financial statements.
